result.summary: The page is mostly usable, but several elements appear horizontally clipped or obscured, suggesting responsive layout/overflow issues on this mobile viewport.

issues.description: Content appears to overflow horizontally. The game grid shows a partially cut-off third column on the right, with game cards clipped by the screen edge.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the responsive grid for this viewport, likely to a true 2-column layout, or ensure any horizontal carousel behavior is intentional with proper spacing and scroll affordance.

issues.description: The category navigation row is clipped on the right; the “Hot Games” tab is only partially visible.
issues.suggestion: Make the tab row horizontally scrollable with clear padding/snap behavior, or resize tabs so they fit cleanly within the viewport.

issues.description: The fixed bottom navigation overlaps the lower game content, making the bottom row of cards appear partially hidden behind the nav bar.
issues.suggestion: Add sufficient bottom padding to the scrollable content area so the last rows can scroll fully above the fixed bottom navigation.

issues.description: Some card overlays, such as info icons and jackpot text, sit very close to card edges and can feel cramped or partially obscured on small screens.
issues.suggestion: Increase internal padding for card overlays and verify they remain readable across mobile breakpoints.
